audit_result.proof_trace: Blob transaction validation (lines 456-488) checks fork activation, blob count, and sidecar type, but does not verify that blob transactions are not contract creations (to != None). EIP-4844 prohibits blob transactions from being create transactions, but pool validator lacks this check.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Attacker submits EIP-4844 blob transaction with to=None (contract creation). Pool validator accepts it despite invalid field combination, polluting mempool with unexecutable transaction that wastes bandwidth and node resources until execution-layer rejection.

PROP-5a6a79d5-asm-002.text: Transaction senders control all tx fields; validation must reject invalid field combinations.
PROP-5a6a79d5-asm-002.assertion: forall tx: check_transaction(tx) validates type, fees, gas, nonce, balance, blobs, auth
